source_description: Issue #24 — Printing House: Hub-Location + Edict-System (stub). Phase 1 of Vertical Slice Epic #32. Replaces the under-construction Druckerei dialog (currently a 1-line stub from #29) with a working Edict-publish flow: 1 NPC (Drucker/Curator), 2 proof-of-concept edicts (patrol-reduction, merchant-discount), faction-gated availability via #25, persistence, run-start hook points. Out of scope: full edict catalog, cooldowns/costs, visible city reactions, story-gating.
